incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on first attempt

steps.text: Not quite. Count by 5s: 5, 10, 15. How many times did you count?

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols on second attempt

params.description: Slides row highlights in data table showing 15.

steps.text: Look at Slides in the table: 15. Each symbol stands for 5. Count by 5s until you reach 15. That tells you how many symbols to place.

incorrects.description: Student placed wrong number of symbols three or more times. System models the answer.

params.description: System demonstrates placing symbols one at a time in Slides column while counting by 5s: 5, 10, 15. Three symbols appear.

steps.text: Let me show you. Slides has 15. Each symbol represents 5. I count by 5s: 5, 10, 15. That is 3 fives, so 3 symbols. The answer is 3 symbols for Slides.
